title: Exploratory Data Analysis (EDA) Workflow
description: A flowchart illustrating the key steps and iterative process of Exploratory Data Analysis as covered in Module 5.
relationships: Data Acquisition feeds into Data Cleaning
Data Cleaning feeds into Univariate Analysis
Univariate Analysis feeds into Bivariate/Multivariate Analysis
Analysis steps lead to Hypothesis Generation
Findings from analysis often loop back to inform further Data Cleaning or new questions
